package.notes: No salary/package details were shared in the placement cell announcements.

hiring_process: Registration - eligibility verification + company shortlisting
Online Assessment (8 Sept) at IIPS - Aptitude, Logical Reasoning, Programming/Coding, Technical MCQs (Laptop + Webcam + Mic mandatory)
Technical Interviews (9 Sept onwards) - 3-4 evaluation rounds over 4 days depending on role
Typical flow: Technical Interview -> Coding/Problem Solving -> Technical Discussion/Managerial Round -> HR/Final Discussion

final_selects.notes: Additional names could be added later after final confirmations from the company.

companies.quick_overview: MCA & M.Tech(IT) 2026 batch, CGPA 7.0+, 10th/12th 70%+. Process: Registration -> Online Assessment -> 3-4 Technical/Managerial Interview Rounds over 4 days -> Final Selection. Assessment at IIPS, online with webcam/mic monitoring. No package details shared.

hiring_process: Registration - application form + basic eligibility screening
Interview Rounds at company premises - candidates divided into Group 1-4, called on different dates (9th-12th Sept). No online assessment; process was interview-based.
Final Round - only shortlisted candidates invited (Ayush Sharma, Sakshi Muchhala, Aanchal Vyas among final round candidates)
Final Selection
companies.quick_overview: Package 5.5 LPA, location Indore. Eligible: MCA, M.Tech, M.Sc. Process was primarily interview-driven (no aptitude/coding test mentioned) - Registration -> Company Shortlisting -> Multiple Group-wise Interview Rounds -> Final Round -> Final Selection. 7 candidates selected.

hiring_process: Registration & Shortlisting - eligibility verification + resume screening
Online Assessment - Aptitude, Logical Reasoning, Technical MCQs, basic Coding

AI-Enabled Bot Interview (BerriBot) - only 92 shortlisted appeared; evaluated technical knowledge, coding, problem-solving, resume-based questions, communication; AI-proctored (webcam, face detection, browser tab monitoring, screen/audio sharing, anti-cheating checks)
Technical Interview by LTIMindtree SME Panels - Java/C/C++/Python, DBMS, OOP, OS, Networking, Projects, Coding discussion
Final Selection - some candidates initially marked 'In Progress', remaining final selects announced later

final_selects.notes: First list released via attached Excel with some 'Interview In Progress' candidates; these 3 announced later.

companies.quick_overview: GET role, 4.05 LPA, no bond. Eligible: BE/BTech/ME/MTech, MCA, Integrated M.Sc(CS/IT), 60%+, no backlogs, max 2-year gap. Process: Registration -> Shortlisting -> Online Assessment -> AI Bot Interview (BerriBot, coding+technical, proctored) -> Technical Interview (SME Panel) -> Final Selection. Special feature: AI-enabled BerriBot interview.

hiring_process: Registration - Typeform + Google Form submission
Online Assessment (11 Sept) - Aptitude, Logical Reasoning, Programming, Technical MCQs, Basic Coding

AI Interview (16 Sept) via Incruiter platform - webcam & mic mandatory, AI proctoring and recording, OTP-based login, Chrome browser on laptop only. Question types: Technical, Programming concepts, Resume & project discussion, HR/Behavioral, recorded video responses (one attempt per question)
L2 In-Person Technical Interview (20 Sept) at DigiValet office - OOPs, DBMS, SQL, Java/C++/Python, Coding problems, Projects, Problem-solving
Final HR Interview - Introduction, Strengths & weaknesses, Relocation, Salary expectations, Bond acceptance, Career goals
Final Selection

final_selects.notes: The announcements shared do not include the final selection list.

companies.quick_overview: Software Engineer role, training stipend 20K/month, post-confirmation CTC 4-5 LPA, Indore, 2-year bond. Eligible: MCA (IIPS/SCSIT), unplaced only. Process: Registration -> Online Assessment -> AI Interview (Incruiter) -> L2 Technical Interview (office) -> HR Interview -> Final Selection.

hiring_process: Registration - online Google Form + basic eligibility verification
Company Induction (PPT) - company introduction, roles & technology overview, internship/job expectations
Group Discussion (GD) - evaluated on Communication Skills, Confidence, Teamwork, Analytical Thinking, Leadership
Technical Interview - Java/Python, OOP, DBMS, SQL, React (frontend role), AI/ML basics (Python role), Projects, Problem-solving. Shortlisted candidates asked to resubmit resumes.
Internship Offer under Optum ANVAYA Program - start date 1 Oct 2025, work includes AI Solutions, Cloud-native Apps, IoT Solutions, CI/CD, Automation, Testing, Production Support, Daily Scrum
companies.quick_overview: Client Optum, roles Java Backend/React Frontend/Python-AI-ML Developer, 5-7 LPA, WFH. Eligible: MCA, M.Tech, CGPA 7.0+. Process: Registration -> Company Induction -> Group Discussion -> Technical Interview -> Internship Offer (ANVAYA Program). Internship starts 1 Oct 2025. 12 candidates selected.

hiring_process: Round 1 - PPT (Pre-Placement Talk, mandatory attendance) + Online Assessment (Aptitude+Technical for FE / Analytics for BA)
Round 2 - Interview Round 1 (FE: Technical Interview, BA: Business Analyst Interview)
Round 3 - Interview Round 2 (FE: Advanced Technical/Problem Solving)
Round 4 - HR Interview
Final Selection
companies.quick_overview: Stipend 24K/month, FTE package 8.5 LPA (6.5 fixed + 2L QCDP bonus), location Mumbai/Bangalore, 6-month internship. Roles: Framework Engineer, Business Analyst. Process: PPT -> Online Test -> Interview R1 -> Interview R2 (FE)/Further Evaluation -> HR -> Final Selection. 4 candidates selected (2 IET, 2 IIPS).

package.role: Digital Nurture 4.0 - Java Full Stack Engineer (Java FSE)

eligibility.relocation: Ready to work from any Cognizant location

hiring_process: Registration & Screening - basic eligibility check + academic records verification
Communication Assessment (Online) - English Speaking, Reading, Listening, Grammar, Pronunciation, Sentence formation
Technical Qualifier Assessment (Online) - Java, ANSI SQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript; MCQs, Coding, SQL Queries, Output-based questions, Debugging
Self Learning & Deep Skilling - ~8 weeks Java Full Stack learning, final assessment after training, only good performers move ahead
Technical Interview (Offline) - Java OOP, Collections, Exception Handling, Multithreading (basic), JDBC, SQL Queries & Joins, HTML/CSS/JS, Projects, Coding on Java, DBMS & OS basics
Final Selection - Document Verification, Internal Audit, Offer Letter
companies.quick_overview: Digital Nurture 4.0 program, Java Full Stack Engineer role. GenC Next: 6.75 LPA, GenC Trainee: 4 LPA. Eligible: BE/BTech/ME/MTech (CS/IT/Circuit), 70%+ throughout, no backlogs. Process: Registration -> Communication Assessment -> Technical Qualifier Assessment -> 8-week Self Learning/Deep Skilling -> Technical Interview -> Final Selection. Only 1 attempt allowed per assessment; AI tool use (e.g. ChatGPT) during tests leads to disqualification. Webcam + Mettl Secure Browser mandatory.

products.name: IntelliConnect

products.description: Built for Security and Compliance Monitoring. Continuously monitors whether company rules/regulations (e.g. HIPAA for hospitals, GDPR for EU customer data) are being followed.

products.description: 70% email response time reduction, 35% SLA improvement, auto-routing and ticket creation.

products.name: SentrAI
products.description: Document processing, contract analysis, 80% manual effort reduction.

core_values.name: Curiosity
core_values.hindi: नए विचार तलाशना, सवाल पूछना, और सीखने की इच्छा रखना
core_values.english: Asking questions, exploring new ideas, wanting to learn more.

core_values.name: Integrity
core_values.hindi: सब कुछ में ईमानदारी, पारदर्शिता और विश्वास दिखाना
core_values.english: Being honest, transparent, and trustworthy in everything you do.

core_values.name: Innovation
core_values.hindi: असली समस्याओं को हल करने के लिए नए समाधान बनाना, ट्रेंड नहीं
core_values.english: Creating new solutions to solve real problems, not just following trends.

core_values.name: Speed
core_values.hindi: गुणवत्ता को नुकसान न पहुंचाते हुए तेजी से काम देना
core_values.english: Delivering work quickly without compromising quality.

core_values.name: Empowerment
core_values.hindi: टीमों और क्लाइंट्स को उनकी पूरी क्षमता तक पहुंचने में मदद करना
core_values.english: Helping teams and clients reach their full potential.
